title: o2r span attribute registry
description: Generated from docs/protocol.md. Do not hand-edit.

agent.id.description: Stable per-agent identifier inside the deployment.

session.id.description: Deterministic session identifier. sha256(repo:issue)[:16] for GitHub-rooted channels.

user.id.description: Sender identity. Propagated via OpenInference using_user().

graph.node.id.description: Topology node identifier for cross-trace graph rendering.

graph.node.parent_id.description: Parent node id in the topology graph.

o2r.task.state_change.description: State transition recorded as a span event attribute.

o2r.peer.target.description: Target peer id for a relay forward.

o2r.peer.sender_role.description: Registered role of the sending peer.

o2r.peer.target_role.description: Registered role of the target peer.

o2r.relay.mode.description: Relay routing mode in effect for this span.

o2r.relay.reject_reason.description: Reason a relay rejected a message.

o2r.relay.failure_class.description: Coarse failure class on any erroring relay span.

o2r.method.description: A2A JSON-RPC method name driving this span.
